failure_signature: Evolver skill attempted to read session logs from a different agent workspace, causing cross-agent log contamination in multi-agent setup
remedy: Always isolate cwd strictly when running evolver. Use single-shot mode (not --loop) and set EVOLVE_STRATEGY=harden in multi-agent environments.

failure_signature: CDP skill failed to connect because Chrome sandbox environment lacked required dependencies (libx11, libxcomposite) for headless mode
remedy: Skill should detect missing browser dependencies and provide installation instructions, or gracefully degrade to a simpler scraping method.

failure_signature: docx skill failed in sandboxed environment because python-docx package was not installed and pip install was blocked
remedy: Skill should detect required package availability upfront and suggest alternative execution environments. Consider bundling pure-Python fallback.
